FLOW.COMMENT: vfPersistToFile - persists an input string to a local file for temporary storage for large documents

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: transactionCreate - allocate a transaction id, determine the knowns, and insert a new record into TFW_TRANS_ACTIVE

record.value: 0 or the sessionid of the caller
if parent is not 0, this is the child number starting with 1
